verificationNote: Indicative mapping between ISO 27001:2022 Annex A and BNM RMiT sections. Organizations should validate against official frameworks.
title: ISO 27001:2022 to BNM RMiT Mapping

mappings.notes: Security policies support RMiT governance requirements
Roles and responsibilities align with RMiT governance structure
Threat intelligence supports RMiT cyber threat monitoring
Asset inventory supports RMiT risk identification
Access control aligns with RMiT cyber controls
Supplier security aligns with RMiT outsourcing requirements
Incident management aligns with RMiT incident response
Security during disruption supports RMiT BCP requirements
Physical security perimeters align with RMiT data centre controls
Malware protection supports RMiT endpoint security
Vulnerability management aligns with RMiT requirements
Cryptography controls align closely with RMiT encryption requirements
Secure SDLC supports RMiT development requirements
